title: When Status Changes to X, move item to top of Group
excerpt: For important items, this would be a useful automation to have. For example, when status changes to ‘Critical’ > move item to top of Group

posts.author: RusheelSuddhoo (Rusheel Suddhoo)
posts.cookedHtml: For important items, this would be a useful automation to have. For example, when status changes to ‘Critical’ > move item to top of Group
